changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET giver_user_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN students s ON s.id = u.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feedback_questions fq JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fq.id = fr.question_id AND fs.course_id = u.course_id ) AND lower(u.email) = lower(fr.giver) AND fr.giver_user_id IS NULL AND fr.giver_team_id IS NULL;

UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET giver_user_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN instructors i ON i.id = u.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feedback_questions fq JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fq.id = fr.question_id AND fs.course_id = u.course_id ) AND lower(u.email) = lower(fr.giver) AND fr.giver_user_id IS NULL AND fr.giver_team_id IS NULL;

UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET giver_team_id = t.id FROM teams t JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = t.section_id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feedback_questions fq JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fq.id = fr.question_id AND fs.course_id = sec.course_id ) AND t.name = fr.giver AND fr.giver_user_id IS NULL AND fr.giver_team_id IS NULL;
UPDATE feedback_responses SET recipient_type = 'NO_SPECIFIC_RECIPIENT' WHERE recipient = '%GENERAL%' AND recipient_type IS NULL;

UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET recipient_type = 'STUDENT', recipient_user_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN students s ON s.id = u.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feedback_questions fq JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fq.id = fr.question_id AND fs.course_id = u.course_id ) AND lower(u.email) = lower(fr.recipient) AND fr.recipient_type IS NULL AND fr.recipient_user_id IS NULL AND fr.recipient_team_id IS NULL;

UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET recipient_type = 'INSTRUCTOR', recipient_user_id = u.id FROM users u JOIN instructors i ON i.id = u.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feedback_questions fq JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fq.id = fr.question_id AND fs.course_id = u.course_id ) AND lower(u.email) = lower(fr.recipient) AND fr.recipient_type IS NULL AND fr.recipient_user_id IS NULL AND fr.recipient_team_id IS NULL;

UPDATE feedback_responses fr SET recipient_type = 'TEAM', recipient_team_id = t.id FROM teams t JOIN sections sec ON sec.id = t.section_id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feedback_questions fq JOIN feedback_sessions fs ON fs.id = fq.session_id WHERE fq.id = fr.question_id AND fs.course_id = sec.course_id ) AND t.name = fr.recipient AND fr.recipient_type IS NULL AND fr.recipient_user_id IS NULL AND fr.recipient_team_id IS NULL;
